replies.msg:
my home Wi-Fi brandband contract ends July 2022
and I'm planning to move to London on Sept 2021. How to handle this remaining period of contract? Change address to another one?

quote.msg:
my home Wi-Fi brandband contract ends July 2022
and I'm planning to move to London on Sept 2021. How to handle this remaining period of contract? Change address to another one?

replies.msg:
UK or HK?
If UK, just let the provider know your rental lease ended and you have to terminate the current contract. Set up a new one at your new place, or seek for an transfer to the new place.
